utterances.text: A wealth tax is just unfair to middle-income families.
utterances.author: alex

utterances.text: That wealth tax is unfair and it targets hard-working households.
utterances.author: blair

utterances.text: I hate the idea, because a wealth tax is unfair.
utterances.author: casey

utterances.text: A national wealth tax would devastate the economy and wreck budgets.
utterances.author: dana

utterances.text: The wealth tax would devastate the economy over the next decade.
utterances.author: elliot

utterances.text: The top 1% holds about 20% of U.S. wealth.
utterances.author: frank

utterances.text: About 20% of U.S. wealth is held by the top one percent.
utterances.author: gina

utterances.text: The top one percent owns only 12% of all U.S. wealth.
utterances.author: harry

claims.claim_text: A wealth tax is unfair to middle-income families.
Charging a wealth tax is unfair to middle-income families.
A national wealth tax is unfair to people who work hard.
A national wealth tax would devastate the economy and budget.
The wealth tax would devastate the economy over the next decade.
The top 1% currently holds about 20% of U.S. wealth.
About 20% of U.S. wealth is controlled by the top one percent.
The top one percent owns only 12% of all U.S. wealth.
